46.reason: [Accesses f[t2] after decrementing t2, but t2 may be 0 leading to f[-1] which is out-of-bounds. Also, logic for operator precedence handling is flawed and doesn't correctly handle all cases of left-to-right evaluation with precedence.]

49.reason: [If t2 is 0 here, f[t2 - 1] accesses f[-1], causing undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If t2 is 0 here, f[t2 - 1] accesses f[-1], causing undefined behavior.]

63.reason: [Does not account for remaining operators in f[] when t2 > 1; assumes only one operation remains, which is incorrect for expressions with multiple operators of same or mixed precedence.]
